title: New PM first-week journey
decision_use_case: Identify where ProductOS should create immediate leverage for a PM starting tomorrow.
primary_message: The highest-value interventions happen at research intake, synthesis, and decision framing moments.
certainty_notes: Journey pain points are cross-source supported but still early for some startup-specific steps.

items.label: Intake fragmentation
items.description: Signals arrive from notes, reviews, and ad hoc links.

items.label: Decision bottleneck
items.description: PM spends time rewriting context instead of choosing.
